name: DetailTypeAttribute
summary: The DetailTypeAttribute class is used for storing the detail type. Based on the type the system will then position the detail in the creation. The attribute is initialized from the custom attribute [DetailType(DetailTypeEnum.END)] in the connection source.

constructors.name: DetailTypeAttribute
constructors.summary: The custom attribute [DetailType()] uses this to store the type of the detail to the system. This is not to be used by itself.

constructors.name: DetailTypeAttribute
constructors.summary: The custom attribute [DetailType()] uses this to store the type of the detail to the system. This is not to be used by itself.

properties.name: Type
